name: Chicken Breasts in Chive Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound button mushrooms, whole or quartered and wiped clean, stems removed
6 chicken breasts with skin removed and slightly flattened
recipeInstructions:
Beurre Manie is used to thicken sauces. These butter-flour balls can be made ahead in advance and stored in a sealed jar in the refrigerator for 1 or 2 weeks. Combine 1 tablespoon flour and 1 tablespoon sweet butter on a small flat plate and blend into a very smooth paste. Roll the paste into a ball. In a small skillet, heat 2 tablespoons butter. Add scallions and cook for 2-3 minutes without browning. Add mushrooms and season with salt and pepper. Cook over high heat for another 2-3 minutes to lightly brown the mushrooms. Reserve.
1. Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper. Sprinkle with lemon juice. In a large skillet, melt remaining butter until hot. Cook chicken for 1 minute on each side. Cover pan with buttered wax paper and lid. Reduce heat and simmer chicken for 8-10 minutes or until juices run pale yellow when pierced with a fork. Do not overcook.
2. Pour the reserved mushroom and scallion mixture into the skillet, add beurre manie and cook until sauce coats a spoon. Add chives and adjust seasoning.
3. Add chicken stock and reduce to glaze consistency. Stir in heavy cream and continue cooking until thickened.
4. Return chicken breasts to platter, pour sauce over top and serve immediately.
